title: No Tall Flower Duping (NTFD)
description: 🌹Removes the feature of producing tall flowers with bonemeal
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e335cb5e3177ff2d6d8d486df56cb1d2ee93a1e9.png)


I always found the mechanic of right-clicking with bonemeal on two-blocks tall flowers like sunflowers or rose bushes to duplicate them a little bit overpowered and just making any other way of making yellow dye, red dye etc… totally useless where you can just spam bones to get dyes. This really small mod aims to fix that! It just totally cancels the interaction of bonemeal on any #minecraft:tall_flowers ! This mod should work with any tall flower with any custom bonemeal interaction. Even deployers from Create or Dispensers.  


[__**Discord**__](https://discord.gg/sNqUAAGRst)

-This mod needs to be installed on both client and server.

-If you want a specific plant to be duplicated with bonemeal regardless of this mod, you can give it the block tag `#no_tall_flower_duping:flower_dupe_whitelist` with datapacks or mods like KubeJS.

-If you find any issue like a modded block/item that can still apply bonemeal to tall flowers or plants that can still be duplicated, please report them, it should be easy to fix (most of the times).

-Fabric is not planned, but if someone would like to port this mod, i would be grateful!

-I shouldn't need to mention it, but sure you can add this mod to your modpack!

_Sorry if i make any mistakes, english is not my native language and i try to not use any translator, if you find any spelling issues or so, please tell me🙏_
